name: 正弦/余弦定理（E）
subject: math
domain_name: 几何与三角 / Geometry & Trig / Geometry & Trig
curriculum_points:
C1.6 The four operations
Use the four operations for calculations with integers, fractions and decimals, including correct ordering of operations and use of brackets.

C1.6 The four operations Notes and examples
Use the four operations for calculations with integers, fractions and decimals, including correct ordering of operations and use of brackets.
Includes:
• negative numbers
• improper fractions
• mixed numbers
• practical situations, e.g. temperature changes.

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。
